title: 2026 Academy Awards: Best Actress Winner
text: Jessie Buckley received the Oscar for best actress for her performance in Hamnet at the 98th Academy Awards ceremony held on Sunday, March 15, 2026, in Hollywood. The event was hosted by Conan O'Brien. Buckley's win came during a night that saw One Battle After Another capture best picture and director, while Sinners dominated with a record-breaking 16 nominations and secured several major awards including best actor for Michael B. Jordan and best original screenplay for Ryan Coogler. Buckley's victory represents the culmination of her unprecedented awards season sweep across all major precursor ceremonies. Her performance in Hamnet, directed by Chloé Zhao, delivered a portrayal of Agnes Shakespeare that resonated with critics, audiences, and Academy voters alike. The film received eight total Oscar nominations, demonstrating its significance in the awards landscape despite missing key technical categories like Best Editing and Best Cinematography.
